name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



check-group-exclude: pmlogger_check pmlogger_daily



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
7a8,16
> Dec 10 20:12:34 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1096192]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Dec 10 20:12:34 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1096192]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Dec 10 20:12:34 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1096192]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Dec 10 20:29:50 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1362242]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Dec 10 20:29:50 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1362242]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Dec 10 20:29:50 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1362242]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Dec 10 20:39:03 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1474603]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Dec 10 20:39:03 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1474603]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Dec 10 20:39:03 c350ad7547b0 pmie[1474603]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
